title: Elip Adventure
description: Description In Elip Adventure, you engage in a thrilling quest as an ellipse, navigating through treacherous maps to locate stars that unlock the elliptical house. Each stage presents a different challenge, with numerous obstacles and antagonists designed to hinder your progress. Whether you choose to outmaneuver or confront these enemies calls for strategic choices contributing to a dynamic gaming experience.
instructions: - WASD move - MOUSE RIGHT or X jump - SPACE or Z wall walking
